quality_findings.finding: sources.js still builds the sources-page menu from legacy sector keys such as roads, utilities, metro, rail, buildings, parks, planning, eia, uncrewed, ai, and other, while the homepage and category flow now use five active layer keys.
quality_findings.risk: Users can open stale category URLs from the data-sources page, creating a split navigation experience and confusing the single-source five-layer structure.
quality_findings.recommended_fix: Change the sources-page sector menu to public-works, roads-utilities, transit, buildings-parks, and planning-eia; update source-page copy and placeholders to match those five layers.

excluded_from_active: 完工/啟用超過一個月資料
next_priority_sources: 道路挖掘與管線公開圖資
